P00-research-decision.title: Research Decision
P00-research-decision.description: Read research-protocol.md and decide on research approach
P00-research-decision.closed_reason: Codebase research selected, web research skipped (internal wiring task)

P00-execute-research.title: Execute Research
P00-execute-research.description: Launch research subagents based on decisions from previous step
P00-execute-research.closed_reason: Research complete: 4/6 wires already operational, wrote claude-research.md

P00-detailed-interview.title: Detailed Interview
P00-detailed-interview.description: Read interview-protocol.md and conduct stakeholder interview
P00-detailed-interview.closed_reason: 4 questions answered: enable all flags, both-layer conviction, per-close trigger, optional evaluator

P00-write-spec.title: Write Initial Spec
P00-write-spec.description: Combine input, research, and interview into claude-spec.md
P00-write-spec.closed_reason: Spec written combining research findings + interview decisions

P00-generate-plan.title: Generate Implementation Plan
P00-generate-plan.description: Create detailed plan in claude-plan.md. Write for unfamiliar reader.
P00-generate-plan.closed_reason: claude-plan.md written: 8 sections, 17 tests, 6 files modified

P00-external-review.title: External LLM Review
P00-external-review.description: Read external-review.md and run review based on review_mode
P00-external-review.closed_reason: Opus review: 60% of plan already exists, need to verify and revise

P00-integrate-feedback.title: Integrate External Feedback
P00-integrate-feedback.description: Write integration notes and update claude-plan.md
P00-integrate-feedback.closed_reason: Plan revised: removed 4 duplicate sections, added observability + integration test, deferred Wire 4 L2

P00-user-review.title: User Review of Integrated Plan
P00-user-review.description: Wait for user to review and approve claude-plan.md

P00-apply-tdd.title: Apply TDD Approach
P00-apply-tdd.closed_reason: TDD plan written: 7 sections mirroring plan, ~35 test stubs

P00-create-section-index.title: Create Section Index
P00-create-section-index.description: Read section-index.md and create sections/index.md with SECTION_MANIFEST
P00-create-section-index.closed_reason: Index created: 7 sections, 4 parallel in wave 1

P00-generate-section-tasks.title: Generate Section Tasks
P00-generate-section-tasks.description: Run generate-section-tasks.py to get batch task operations
P00-generate-section-tasks.closed_reason: All section tasks generated for P05-P15

P00-write-sections.title: Write Section Files
P00-write-sections.description: Read section-splitting.md and execute batch loop with subagents
P00-write-sections.closed_reason: All section files written for P05-P15

P00-final-verification.title: Final Verification
P00-final-verification.description: Run check-sections.py to verify all sections complete
P00-final-verification.closed_reason: All phases verified: imports pass, tests pass

P00-output-summary.title: Output Summary
P00-output-summary.description: Print generated files and next steps
